changeSet.author: schneider
changeSet.comment: Clean up existing data that violates the "only one running stopwatch per tenant and owner" invariant before adding the unique index. Keep the oldest running stopwatch (lowest id) and delete the surplus ones that were created by concurrent or duplicated start requests.
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM time_clock WHERE stopped_at IS NULL AND id NOT IN ( SELECT MIN(id) FROM time_clock WHERE stopped_at IS NULL GROUP BY tenant_id, owner );

changeSet.author: schneider
changeSet.comment: Partial unique index guaranteeing at most one running stopwatch (stopped_at IS NULL) per tenant and owner. Stopped stopwatches (stopped_at IS NOT NULL) are not affected.
